title: TravelAdvisory
description: A country travel advisory issued by the US Department of State Consular Affairs Data API

Title.description: Advisory title including country name and warning level (e.g., 'Nigeria - Level 3: Reconsider Travel')

Link.description: URL to the full advisory page on travel.state.gov

Category.description: Array of two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes associated with this advisory

Summary.description: HTML-formatted summary of the advisory including risk categories such as crime, terrorism, health threats, civil unrest, and kidnapping

id.description: Unique identifier for the advisory, typically the same as the Link URL

Published.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the advisory was first published

Updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to the advisory

Advisory_Level.description: Numeric alert level: 1=Exercise Normal Precautions, 2=Exercise Increased Caution, 3=Reconsider Travel, 4=Do Not Travel

Key_Risks.description: Array of key risk categories associated with the advisory (returned for single-country queries)

examples.Title: Niger - Level 4: Do Not Travel
examples.Summary: The U.S. State Department advises against all travel to Niger due to multiple critical threats.
